violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Limescale build up at juice dispenser water nozzle.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Sani sink made while on-site, found at less than 150ppm Quat. *Sanitizer dispenser (located in laundry) appears to be on the "light" side of solution. Dispenser found at ~300ppm fresh and 125F and then added to water in 3rd kitchen sink. *DO NOT dilute further when using at sani sink or in sani buckets.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. -Could not locate test strips while on-site.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. -Reddi Wip, found at 65F, is kept at room temperature near waffle station during service. *Recommended disposal, and to use ice bath going foraward.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
